title: Internal Error: ../V3Number.cpp:2429: Number operation called with non-double argument: '64'h4018000000000000"
body:
Hello,

I see following internal error when performing arithmetic operation.
```
%Error: Internal Error: top_number.sv:5:84: ../V3Number.cpp:2429: Number operation called with non-double argument: '64'h4018000000000000"
                                          : ... In instance top
    5 |   localparam int OUTPUT = ((INPUT_SIZE-14) > 0)? int'($ceil((real'(INPUT_SIZE-14.0)/120.0))) : 0;
      |                                                                                    ^
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```

Here's the code to reproduce the error:
```
localparam int INPUT_SIZE = 20;

module top(input logic [2:0] c);
  localparam int OUTPUT = ((INPUT_SIZE-14) > 0)? int'($ceil((real'(INPUT_SIZE-14.0)/120.0))) : 0;
endmodule
```
```
verilator -cc top.sv
```

Verilator version: 5.014
